items.title: RIDEWAVE US box flosna
items.desc: Uszony RIDEWAVE US box flosna:Universal replacement fin RIDEWAVE US box flosna is designed for paddleboards with US box system and is fully compatible with the Ridewave brand. This type of fin is fastened with a screw a…
items.raw_desc: Uszony RIDEWAVE US box flosna:Universal replacement fin RIDEWAVE US box flosna is designed for paddleboards with US box system and is fully compatible with the Ridewave brand. This type of fin is fastened with a screw and plate, allowing fine adjustment of its position as needed - closer to the centre for better manoeuvrability, further away for a more stable ride.
